endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Security/assessmentMetadata
endpoints.description: Get metadata information on all assessment types
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Security/assessmentMetadata/{assessmentMetadataName}
endpoints.description: Get metadata information on an assessment type
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ASSESSMENTMETADATANAME}} with a real assessmentmetadataname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/assessmentMetadata
endpoints.description: Get metadata information on all assessment types in a specific subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/assessmentMetadata/{assessmentMetadataName}
endpoints.description: Get metadata information on an assessment type in a specific subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ASSESSMENTMETADATANAME}} with a real assessmentmetadataname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/assessmentMetadata/{assessmentMetadataName}
endpoints.description: Create metadata information on an assessment type in a specific subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ASSESSMENTMETADATANAME}} with a real assessmentmetadataname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/assessmentMetadata/{assessmentMetadataName}
endpoints.description: Delete metadata information on an assessment type in a specific subscription, will cause the deletion of all the assessments of that type in that subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ASSESSMENTMETADATANAME}} with a real assessmentmetadataname.
